name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
notes: This Building Block defines all Mail devices on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Cisco IronPort, PostFix MailTransferAgent, Microsoft Exchange Server, IBM Lotus Domino, Solaris Operating System Sendmail Logs, Trend Micro Deep Discovery Email Inspector, Proofpoint Enterprise Protection/Enterprise Privacy, Barracuda Spam & Virus Firewall, Microsoft Office 365
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Cisco IronPort, PostFix MailTransferAgent, Microsoft Exchange Server, IBM Lotus Domino, Solaris Operating System Sendmail Logs, Trend Micro Deep Discovery Email Inspector, Proofpoint Enterprise Protection/Enterprise Privacy, Barracuda Spam & Virus Firewall, Microsoft Office 365
